src/test/java/com/dstym/pharmaciesonduty.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to adopt Java 21 API.
src/test/java/com/dstym/pharmaciesonduty.why_exists: List.get(0) is deprecated for removal in Java 21; using it triggers deprecation warnings and will cause compilation errors in future JDK versions.
